Intraday post (11/Aug)

Here you can find the weekly post:

CPI and OpEx week - Weekly post (11/Aug - 15/Aug)

Structurally:

After last week Monday squeeze, I said, we can even see a double-top, be careful. We need momentum confirmation into any directions, see the white dashed lines.

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The speed profile draws a long fly pattern, with a relatively small negative skewness (net long speed), with a centroid is at 6392.19 - 6396.90

The upside pivot is 6412.13 (especially strong during the PM, can be broken during the AM, with margin of error of 6420), and low volatility is need to climb higher, but 6410 can pin in the last 2 hours. If market could break out of the centroid to the upside during the AM with low vol, and if it can hold the upside pivot into 11.50am, we likely will see 6435 magnet. Otherwise 6412 is magnetic.

The downside pivot is 6367.62; this is a strong support, and “unbreakable” during the power hour. But if volatility would calm here down, 6360 would be a strong magnet.

However, the main bet of the market is a ranging around the centroid, with roughly 6400 - 6374 area, and expect more liquidity towards 6412/6420 but not beyond. Market shorts upside vol. 6400 is a key level into the opening, watch carefully if the overnight trend goes above or below this. Market is unlikely to break this line through the session.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
